records.ety: [L. erasus, p. p. of eradere to erase; e out + radere to scrape, scratch, shave. See Rase.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Erased (*rāst"); p. pr. & vb. n.. Erasing.]

defs: To rub or scrape out, as letters or characters written, engraved, or painted; to efface; to expunge; to cross out; as, to erase a word or a name.
Fig.: To obliterate; to expunge; to blot out; -- used of ideas in the mind or memory.
